title: The HBM vs L1 Latency Gap
scenario: Roughly how much slower is accessing HBM3 memory compared to an L1 register read?

scenario: Which operation consumes more energy: performing an FP16 multiply-add or reading the operands from DRAM?

scenario: A model has 7 billion parameters. How much VRAM does it occupy just to load the weights in FP16 precision?

scenario: If an accelerator has 1,000 TFLOPS of compute and 2 TB/s of memory bandwidth, what is its ridge point?
